name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality Replica】M12358 Yellow 👏👏 Named after Japanese paper-cutting art, the Kirigami Organizer wallet features a fluid silhouette created by Monogram coated canvas, with a grain leather lining adding bright colors. It includes a detachable zippered pouch and card slots for easy storage of important documents. Dimensions: 23×11×2cm.
